details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

item_specifications.special_feature: Adjustable Height, Airline Approved, Easy to Clean, Easy to Store, Easy to Use

about_item: 【CHECK SIZE BEFORE BUYING】In order to fit the under-seat dimensions of airlines, this carrier can only fit small dogs and cats. We recommend that the pet size you carry be within 15"L x 8"W x 10"H(this carrer's inner size), please choose the carrier reference your pet's length and height. Reference pet weight: dog weight under 10LBS and cat weight under 12LBS.

【AIRLINE APPROVED CARRIER 】Unfolded size:18"L×11"W×(11+3.5)"H, Petskd pet carrier is TSA approved and can be placed under the seat in the cabin, it is mainly designed for ①Delta Airlines:18x11x11" ②United Airlines:18x11x11" ③American Airlines:18x11x11". We recommend you buy this carrier when you fly with the above-mentioned airlines.

【BETTER VENTILATION】Petskd pet carrier has mesh ventilation on 5 sides for good ventilation and good viewing—perfect for your pet to look out and for you to check on your pet;the Dog carrier has 3 openings, and each opening has two non-slip zippers to ensure pet safety.

【SAFE DESIGN】Soft dog travel carrier bag upgraded structural design of stainless steel and Fiber rod that makes our dog carrier bags for small dogs will not be out of shape or sagged and the top does not collapse, pet dog carrier bag preferable stability. Built-in adjustable rope buckle, easy to lock the collar. Zipped snap lock to avoid pets to open or grab open the zipper.

【DURABLE MATERIAL】Made of waterproof, non-toxic, scratch-resistant polyester fabric material, waterproof and wear-resistant; after comparing similar products, we upgraded the mesh material to effectively prevent pets from tearing the mesh with their nails and prevent pets from falling out of the carrier.

【QUALITY GUARANTEE】: Petskd offers a 12 months warranty service, Quality problems within 12 months can be replaced for free on new models. So if you have any problems with your product, please feel free to contact us and we will get back to you as soon as possible within 24 hours.

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier to be of great quality, sturdy, and perfect for air travel, with one mentioning it's approved for international travel. The carrier fits well under the seat and is comfortable, with one customer noting their pet can be more comfortable while waiting at the airport. While some customers like the size, others find it too small, and customers consider it good value for money.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for Flying!
authors_reviews.text: Perfect for flying! We had no issues with Alaska Airlines with these carriers. I love that they can unzip from the side or the top, it was perfect when going through security. The size was perfect for under the seat, we had no issues at all. I love that you can clip the zippers together so they don’t accidentally open. It is very sturdy, and our larger cat was comfortable. I really like that you can pop the top up for more space. Great product!
authors_reviews.author: Kat

authors_reviews.title: Awesome pet carrier!
authors_reviews.text: After looking around for many many months and trying several different pet carriers, I decided to give this one a try. I love the fact that the top expands so that your pup can be more comfortable while waiting at the airport. Then when it’s time to put them under the seat, you just zip that top part down and it slides easily under The seat in front of you. It also has a storage pocket on the outside, perfect for tucking dog treats, etc. The bottom is also firm enough that it doesn’t sag under my 15 pound dogs weight, and also allows it to sit on top of your wheeled luggage. It has a short tether inside to clip onto your dog’s collar if you care to, as a safety feature to keep them from jumping out. I opted not to use that so that she could turn around while she was in there if she chose to.Super pet carrier at a great price!
authors_reviews.author: Barbara

authors_reviews.title: Used it for our 10 lb yorkie on Southwest flight - it worked great.
authors_reviews.text: We used this on a Southwest flight after we adopted our 10 lb yorkie a few months ago (2023). It was suggested to me that it fits best under the middle or window seat so that is where we sat. Our dog was comfortable, not squished at all. It seems so big when you get it that it is hard to imagine it will fit under the seat but it did. Important thing to note is that you might need to slide it in from the aisle because if you try to walk to the middle seat and then set it down on the ground it is too wide to fit between your seat and the back of the seat in front of you. We had to tip it sideways to get it down to the ground. So the solution to that is to put it on the ground while you are in the aisle at your row, and then slide it to the middle seat. Easy peasy. We are about to take another trip with him and we will use it again. We used a small soft pad inside, covered it with a pee pad for accidents, put pet wipes and treats in the outside pocket along with a clip on collapsible water bowl. While the crate worked perfectly as designed, out dog was very anxious. I had spoken to the vet before the first flight and they said you just never know how a dog will do so next time around we will use the vet recommended calming meds a few hours before boarding to ease his discomfort. But the pet carrier was PERFECT!
authors_reviews.author: KJohnson

authors_reviews.title: The size is good and approved by the airlines
authors_reviews.text: This pet travel bag is very well made. It has a top zipper and a solid strap. I like that I will be able to attach it to my roller suitcase so I won't have to carry it over my shoulder the entire time. I have not traveled with it yet, but it is the first one I have purchased that my 15lb poodle would actually get into. I'm excited to be able to bring my little buddy along on my travels.
authors_reviews.author: @One Thing Focus Method

authors_reviews.title: Returned
authors_reviews.text: I bought this bag in two different colors and ended up returning the gray one because I like the black one more. I love the size and it is easy to use. It definitely gets you through TSA and is accepted by all of the airlines due to the Size of the bag. The size of the bag makes it very sturdy and is a great value for your money.
authors_reviews.author: Queen

authors_reviews.title: Great bag for your pup
authors_reviews.text: Great quality bag. Very well made. Worth the price. And its very sturdy
authors_reviews.author: MisterAD

authors_reviews.title: Fits perfectly under plane seat.
authors_reviews.text: This carrier worked great for traveling by plane. My cat is 10 pounds and fit just fine. She felt safe in it and did fantastic on the plane. Highly recommended.
authors_reviews.author: dpeff

authors_reviews.title: Great quality
authors_reviews.text: Great quality and looks good. I used it recently and flew on American Airlines. No issues.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Kunde

other_countries_reviews.title: Travel/Airline approved pet carrier
other_countries_reviews.text: We travel a lot with our Yorkie and what I like about this bag is that the top raises to give her extra standing space if she wants it. When flying the carrier fits perfectly under the seat in front of me. I like that the carrier has lots of visual/air ventilation screens. It has one side or rear pouch to put treats in, leash/harness or doggie bags. It has a side strap to attach the carrier to the suitcase and basically, I’m happier when my pup has lots of in comfort/space to travel in.
other_countries_reviews.author: Cyn
